zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph Basset II of Sapcote於1189年出生在英國斯塔福爾德雷頓 巴塞特時，他的父親Sir Simon Basset of Sapcote24歲，母親Elizabeth de Avenal24歲。他和Millicent Chaucombe至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於大約1282年在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾薩普可特享年94歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph Basset II of Sapcote于1189年出生在英国斯塔福爾德雷頓 巴塞特时，他的父亲Sir Simon Basset of Sapcote24岁，母亲Elizabeth de Avenal24岁。他和Millicent Chaucombe至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于大约1282年在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾薩普可特享年94岁。

nameMeanings.name: Basset
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: from a diminutive of Old French bas(se) ‘short, of low stature’ (see Bas ).
English: variant of   Bassett  , a cognate of 1 above.
In some cases also an altered form of French Besset (see Bessette 2). Compare Bassette 1.

variants.name: Bas
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Mauricio, Abelardo, Florencio, Francisco, Jorge, Luis, Manuel, Pedro, Soledad, Vicente.  Eastern Slavic Dmytro, Liya, Pyotr, Sergey.
Catalan: habitational name from a place so named in the district of La Garrotxa, Catalonia.
Basque: topographic name for someone who lived by a wood, from baso ‘wood, forest’.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph Basset II of Sapcote was born in 1189, in Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, England, his father, Sir Simon Basset of Sapcote, was 24 and his mother, Elizabeth de Avenal, was 24. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Millicent Chaucombe. He died about 1282, in Sapcote, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 94.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph Basset II of Sapcote est né en 1189, à Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Simon Basset of Sapcote, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Avenal, avait 24 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Millicent Chaucombe. Il est décédé environ 1282, à Sapcote, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 94 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph Basset II of Sapcote 1189 in Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Simon Basset of Sapcote 24 und seine Mutter Elizabeth de Avenal 24. Er hatte mit Millicent Chaucombe mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1282 im Alter von 94 Jahren in Sapcote, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Basset II of Sapcote è nato il nel 1189 nel Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Simon Basset of Sapcote, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth de Avenal, aveva 24 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Millicent Chaucombe. Morì circa 1282, nel Sapcote, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 94 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph Basset II of Sapcoteが1189年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアドレイトン バセットで生まれた時，父Sir Simon Basset of Sapcoteは24歳，母Elizabeth de Avenalは24歳であった。彼はMillicent Chaucombeとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1282年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアサプコトで94歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph Basset II of Sapcote(이)가 1189년 영국 스태퍼드실르 드라이턴 배싯에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Simon Basset of Sapcote(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth de Avenal(은)는 24세였다. 그는 Millicent Chaucombe(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1282년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 사p컷에서 94세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Basset II of Sapcote nasceu em 1189, em Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Simon Basset of Sapcote, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Avenal, tinha 24 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Millicent Chaucombe. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1282, em Sapcote, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 94 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph Basset II of Sapcote родился в 1189 г. в местности дреитон бассетт, стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Simon Basset of Sapcote было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Avenal, 24. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Millicent Chaucombe. Он умер около 1282 г. в местности сапкот, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 94 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ralph Basset II of Sapcote nació en 1189, en Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Simon Basset of Sapcote, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Elizabeth de Avenal, tenía 24 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Millicent Chaucombe. Murió aproximadamente 1282, en Sapcote, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 94 años.
